falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Updates should be the blanket default for acknowledged control actions
falsificationQueries: Temporal TypeScript message passing updates worker availability
Temporal update with start version requirements
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Updates are the right primitive when validation, receipts, or returned values matter, but they are more availability-sensitive than Signals and should not be described as the universal answer for every write.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Blob-ref-first llm_attempts ledger is safe by default
falsificationQueries: Convex state limits document size bandwidth
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: The ledger split holds, but replay and reproducibility become fragile unless the blueprint specifies blob retention, hashing, inline metadata, and redaction/expiry behavior.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Create-then-start is the universal default handoff
falsificationQueries: Temporal signal with start update with start official docs
start workflow in transaction Temporal community guidance
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Create-then-start is only one of several sane patterns. The choice needs to be flow-specific and should not be presented as if idempotent workflow IDs solve cross-system consistency by themselves.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Describe plus Query together define the strong-truth tier
falsificationQueries: Temporal visibility approximate count query worker online
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Query depends on worker availability and should not share the same truth tier as Describe. The strong-truth ordering needs to be explicit.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Pinned rollout is the free early default
falsificationQueries: Temporal worker versioning preview draining caveats
continue as new update signal handler restriction
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Replay testing and continue-as-new remain strong defaults, but pinned rollout carries preview and draining costs that make it conditional rather than universal.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Temporal clearly wins over Restate and Inngest without explicit rejection criteria
falsificationQueries: Restate workflow exactly once per id official docs
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Temporal still leads, but the alternatives are credible enough that the blueprint needs explicit rejection criteria rather than broad default claims.
